TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Namibia, title = Namibia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Namibia} }

S.FORM: Namibia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 22 00 S, 17 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 824,292 sq km (maki' tay 34ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 823,290 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 1,002 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 2,436,469. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 47.20%, lhlahuy hya' ga 8.80%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 44%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Windhoek. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 21 na tay cyugal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Hage Geingob, aring ryax 21 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Namibia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 22 00 S, 17 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 824,292 sq km (maki' tay 34ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 823,290 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 1,002 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 2,436,469. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 47.20%, lhlahuy hya' ga 8.80%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 44%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Windhoek. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 21 na tay cyugal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Hage Geingob, aring ryax 21 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: namiő≤ia ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** s~…ē, ** ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a *,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a win*ńßoek. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ńßa…£e …£eiŇčoő≤, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
